page_content:
Formerly: ARTT354.

ARTT260 Dangerous Art: Censorship or Subsidy (3 Credits)

Combines a broad historical analysis of the relationship between art

and authority with an examination of contemporary culture criticism

and art practice. Explores the uses and abuses of art and culture in totalitarianand theocratic states as a prelude to a review of the role of official culture in the United States. Examines art and culture in the public arena and many related areas where the arts and policy interact.
